title: ruehssia spiralis
intro: Ruehssia spiralis, also known as creeping Jenny, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. In terms of health benefits, Ruehssia spiralis is believed to have a positive effect on the digestive system, immune system, and skin health. Herbal preparations of Ruehssia spiralis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
